_note: Authored fresh for issue #288 as the committed proof that a knowledge-profile registry entry (no anchor_map_path, no section_config_path -- see scripts/playbook_registry.py::profile()) goes green through CI with no anchor map. Deliberately has no 'hard_rejections' and no topic 'section_anchors' -- a knowledge-profile playbook answers questions from corpus knowledge, not from the precision anchor/detector/coverage pipeline that machinery requires.
